response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a generalist full-stack engineer with genuine breadth across web, embedded, and distributed systems, but the resume shows no meaningful experience in the core competencies this role requires: experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, growth measurement, or statistical/experimental analysis. His highest-volume production systems work (Sociomantic, handling millions of HTTP requests/second) is the closest relevant signal, but it predates recent years and is focused on data integration rather than experimentation or telemetry. His current title and scope (Senior, not Principal/Staff) and an active career gap further widen the distance from an IC6 principal role owning cross-org growth strategy.
strengths: Proven high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic, handling millions of HTTP requests/second using async I/O and low-latency patterns
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, demonstrating current engagement with modern AI developer ecosystems
Broad polyglot background (TypeScript, D, C++, Java, C#, Node.js) with over 15 years of professional software development across multiple domains
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the core requirements of this role
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure ownership, growth measurement systems, or statistical/experimental analysis work at any stage of career
Has not operated at Principal/IC6 scope; titles are Senior or Staff with limited evidence of multi-team architectural ownership or cross-org technical leadership

key_factors.factor: Missing telemetry and metrics infrastructure depth
